authority.approval_gate: User asked to continue with the same SDL-governed instructions after the cli-spec-lock phase merged. Proceeding with the hardening phase: artifact hash verification, xcodebuild validation, and AC16 performance benchmarks.

verification_and_rollback_plan.verification: swift build and swift test pass; ModelContainerPool verifies downloaded bytes once at worker-load time against registered SHA-256 checksums; xcodebuild validation attempted for macOS and iOS Simulator with upstream CudaBuild plugin failure documented; CouncilBenchmarks target measures first-opinion, end-to-end, and peak-memory against AC16 thresholds; sibling-agent review passes.
verification_and_rollback_plan.rollback_plan: Delete branch sdl/council-swift-hardening and abandon associated PR; revert benchmark and verifier changes manually if merged.

authority.client_orchestrator_mutation_gate: Satisfied by explicit user instruction to continue and authority envelope in this lifecycle record.

retrospective_reviews.summary: Artifact hash verification review: implementation correct and safely wired. Notes: add sharded-model test coverage and consider de-duplicating checksum computation.
Benchmark design review: blocked on repeated verification at borrow time. Fixed by moving verification to load-time. Notes: define first-opinion latency precisely and validate on reference hardware.

Documentation and xcodebuild blocker review: blocked on lifecycle record path accuracy and summary inconsistencies. Fixed. xcodebuild failure reproduced and documented as upstream mlx-swift CudaBuild plugin issue.
SDL governance review: blocked on open lifecycle record, missing PR link, and stale touched_paths. All fixed; commits include required SDL trailers.
Focused re-review after fixes: load-time verification confirmed, lifecycle record paths corrected, PR #7 link added, working tree committed.
